content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (iter-014)

## Closest-to-completion / next target
- **OcOfD L632/L635 wiring** is now UNBLOCKED. `krullDim_curve_le_one` (`CurveKrullDim.lean`) is axiom-clean
  end-to-end. iter-013 plan deferred this to iter-014 (didn't co-dispatch fragile OcOfD). Wire `hdim` into
  the cotangent pin's consumer (`isDiscreteValuationRing_stalk_of_finrank_cotangentSpace_eq_one`) ‚Äî per the
  planner's prior note this is ~one line. HARD GATE: re-confirm `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex` complete+correct
  before sending a prover (it was cleared for iter-014 by the iter-013 blueprint-reviewer, but mandatory
  re-dispatch applies). OcOfD has many open sorries (S3 gated) ‚Äî scope the lane tightly to the wiring first.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî signature smell (lean-auditor major, planner decision; review cannot edit .lean)
- `ringKrullDim_le_of_moduleFinite_injective` (CurveKrullDim.lean L122-125) carries unused
  `(_hinj : Injective (algebraMap R S))`. The `_` suppresses the lint but the public API is misleading
  (name implies injectivity is load-bearing; it isn't ‚Äî the `‚â§` direction needs only incomparability via
  `comap_lt_comap_of_isIntegral`). Either **drop the hypothesis + rename** (e.g. `ringKrullDim_le_of_moduleFinite`)
  and fix the C call site, or keep `_hinj` and document. This is now off the critical path (G1 not used by the
  embedding-dim route) so it's a cleanliness item, not a blocker. Flagged identically in iter-012; still unaddressed.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî blueprint prose debt (lvb minor; planner edits prose, not markers)
- `RiemannRoch_CurveKrullDim.tex`: 2 `\mathlibok` anchors orphaned by the route change ‚Äî
  `MvPolynomial.ringKrullDim_of_isNoetherianRing`, `exists_finite_inj_algHom_of_fg` (artifacts of the abandoned
  trdeg route). Not broken (`\uses` resolve; doctor clean) but no longer referenced. Retag as retained-infra or
  remove the blocks. Cosmetic.

## LOW ‚Äî stale Lean comments (lean-auditor minor; not retried, planner may opt to clean)
- CurveKrullDim.lean: stale "check which is present" in G1 comment (L62); stale "ABANDONED trdeg route" in C
  comment (L155-156); ~120 lines of `/- Planner strategy -/` blocks now that the file is closed. Pure cleanup.

## 1-to-1 coverage debt (`archon dag-query unmatched`)
- No CurveKrullDim helper is unmatched this iter (the iter-012 `comap_lt_comap_of_isIntegral` debt is now blueprinted).
- 138 total unmatched nodes remain, ALL out-of-cone substrate (`Genus0BaseObjects/*`, `Cohomology/*`, `RigidityLemma.lean`,
  plus `Scheme.ringKrullDimLE_of_coheight_eq_one`) ‚Äî per ARCHON_MEMORY these owe no blueprint entries. No action.

## Standing ‚àû gap (`archon dag-query gaps`)
- `lem:serre_finiteness_mathlib_gap` (S2, "Serre finiteness on a projective scheme") remains the sole ‚àû hole ‚Äî
  an AUTHORISED gap (no Lean obligation; `has_sorry:false`). Not actionable in-loop; surfaced for awareness only.

## Do NOT retry
- The trdeg route for curve dimension (`dim=trdeg`/`trdeg=rankŒ©`) ‚Äî Mathlib-ABSENT, permanently abandoned in favor
  of the now-landed embedding-dimension route. Do not reopen.
